features.heading.description: Heading for the landing-page features section. Keep the brand name 'Namefi'.

features.eyebrow.description: Small eyebrow label above the features section heading.

features.items.ownership.title.description: Title of the 'ownership' feature card on the landing page.

features.items.ownership.description.description: Body copy of the 'ownership' feature card describing tokenizing DNS names into NFTs. Keep 'DNS' and 'NFTs'.

features.items.ai.title.description: Title of the 'AI' feature card on the landing page.

features.items.ai.description.description: Body copy of the 'AI' feature card. Keep the product name 'Namefi AI'.

features.items.marketplace.title.description: Title of the 'marketplace' feature card on the landing page.

features.items.marketplace.description.description: Body copy of the 'marketplace' feature card about trading domains in NFT marketplaces. Keep 'NFT'.

story.tokenization.badge.description: Badge label for the tokenization story panel. Product name — keep 'Namefi NFTs' verbatim.

story.tokenization.title.description: Title of the tokenization story panel about securing DNS ownership onchain. Keep 'Namefi NFTs' and 'DNS'.

story.tokenization.description.description: Body copy of the tokenization story panel explaining NFTs minted on import and burned on export. Keep 'NFT'.

story.tokenization.highlights.mintedOnIm.description: Highlight bullet in the tokenization panel: NFT is minted when a domain is imported.

story.tokenization.highlights.autoEns.description: Highlight bullet in the tokenization panel for AutoENS support. Keep 'AutoENS'.

story.tokenization.highlights.marketplac.description: Highlight bullet in the tokenization panel: assets are marketplace ready.

story.tokenization.media.previewEyebrow.description: Eyebrow label on the Namefi NFT preview card in the tokenization panel. Keep 'Namefi NFT'.

story.tokenization.media.previewTitle.description: Title on the Namefi NFT preview card in the tokenization panel.

story.intelligence.badge.description: Badge label for the intelligence (AI branding) story panel. Product name — keep 'Namefi Brand Studio' verbatim.

story.intelligence.title.description: Title of the intelligence story panel about generating brand directions and domain ideas.

story.intelligence.description.description: Body copy of the intelligence story panel pairing availability data with creative output. Keep 'Namefi AI'.

story.intelligence.highlights.domainGuid.description: Highlight bullet in the intelligence panel: domain-guided AI prompts.

story.intelligence.highlights.logosPoste.description: Highlight bullet in the intelligence panel: logos and posters output.

story.intelligence.highlights.shareReady.description: Highlight bullet in the intelligence panel: share-ready assets.
